item.title: 本周你的胜利是什么？ | What was your win this week?
item.description:
开发团队的Michael Tharrington

发表于 6 月 16 日

大家好👋

希望大家周末愉快。

回顾过去的一周，您为完成什么事情感到自豪？

所有的胜利都很重要 — 无论大小 🎉

开始一个新项目

  • 修复一个棘手的错误
  • 在量子计算方面做开创性的工作🤯

    • 一旦暂停，devteam 将无法评论或发布帖子，直到他们的暂停被删除。

    解除暂停后，devteam 将能够再次发表评论和发布帖子。

    一旦取消发布，devteam 的所有帖子都将隐藏起来，只有他们自己可以访问。

    如果 devteam 没有被暂停，他们仍然可以从他们的仪表板重新发布他们的帖子。

    Michael Tharrington for The DEV Team

    Hey folks 👋

item.title: 要避免的十大后端开发错误 | Top 10 Backend Development Mistakes to Avoid
item.description:
后端开发在构建健壮且高效的 Web 应用程序中起着至关重要的作用。 它涉及服务器端逻辑、数据库和集成的实施和管理，以确保无缝功能。

然而，即使是经验丰富的开发人员也可能会犯下导致性能问题、安全漏洞和用户不满的错误。

在此博客中，我将分享要避免的10 大后端开发错误，阐明常见的陷阱并为成功的开发之旅提供实用的解决方案。

当涉及到用户输入时，验证是最重要的。 未能正确验证输入可能会导致安全漏洞，例如 SQL 注入或跨站点脚本 (XSS) 攻击。 始终在服务器端验证和清理用户输入，以确保它符合预期的标准并且没有恶意内容。

数据库是任何应用程序的支柱。 数据库模式设计不当会导致效率低下、查询缓慢和扩展困难。 花时间彻底分析需求并设计针对应用程序需求优化的数据库结构。 规范化数据，建立适当的关系，并创建索引以提高查询性能。

缓存可以通过减少服务器负载和最小化频繁访问数据的响应时间来显着提高后端性能。 忽视实现缓存机制会导致应用程序性能下降和服务器负载增加。 利用 Redis 或 Memcached 等技术来缓存数据并优化整体响应时间。

安全应该是后端开发的重中之重。 未能实施适当的身份验证和授权机制可能会使您的应用程序容易受到未经授权的访问和数据泄露。 利用 OAuth 或 JWT（JSON Web 令牌）等行业标准协议来确保安全的用户身份验证并实施适当的授权控制。

错误在软件开发中是不可避免的，但是您如何处理它们会产生重大影响。 忽视正确的错误处理和日志记录可能会导致难以解决问题和确定问题的根本原因。 实施强大的错误处理机制和日志记录策略，以有效捕获和跟踪错误，从而及时调试和解决问题。

后端应用程序通常依赖外部 API 来实现各种功能。 未能优化 API 调用可能会导致性能瓶颈和不必要的开销。 尽量减少 API 请求的数量，实施请求批处理，并在适用的情况下考虑异步处理，以提高后端集成的效率。

性能测试对于识别瓶颈、优化资源利用率以及确保您的应用程序能够处理预期负载至关重要。 忽视全面的性能测试可能会导致响应时间变慢、服务器负载高以及用户体验不尽如人意。 定期进行性能测试以及早发现性能问题并相应地优化您的后端基础架构。

随着应用程序的增长，可伸缩性变得至关重要。 未能从早期阶段规划可扩展性可能会导致在处理增加的流量和用户负载时遇到挑战。 在设计后端架构时考虑可扩展性，利用负载平衡器、水平扩展和基于云的解决方案等技术来无缝适应未来的增长。

安全威胁不断演变，后端框架和库中的漏洞经常被发现。 忽视将后端依赖项更新到最新的安全版本可能会使您的应用程序暴露在已知漏洞之下。 随时了解安全公告，及时应用补丁，并定期检查和更新您的后端依赖项，以确保安全的应用程序环境。

文档经常被忽视，但在成功的后端开发中起着至关重要的作用。 文档不足会使其他开发人员难以理解和维护您的代码，从而导致协作延迟和困难。 彻底记录您的代码，包括 API、数据模型和架构决策，以促进更轻松的入职、故障排除和未来开发。

常见问题 (FAQ)

输入验证不充分可能会导致安全漏洞，例如 SQL 注入或跨站点脚本 (XSS) 攻击。 攻击者可以利用这些漏洞执行恶意代码、访问未经授权的数据或破坏整个应用程序。

为确保安全的用户身份验证，请使用行业标准协议，例如 OAuth 或 JWT（JSON Web 令牌）。 这些协议提供基于令牌的安全身份验证，支持用户身份验证并实施适当的授权控制。

性能测试对于识别瓶颈、优化资源利用率以及确保您的应用程序能够处理预期负载至关重要。 它有助于及早发现性能问题并优化后端基础架构，以获得流畅高效的用户体验。

可扩展性规划对于适应未来增长和处理增加的流量和用户负载至关重要。 通过在设计后端架构时考虑可扩展性并利用负载均衡器和基于云的解决方案等技术，您可以无缝地处理应用程序不断增长的需求。

常见问题 5：为什么跟上安全更新对后端开发至关重要？

安全威胁不断演变，后端框架和库中的漏洞经常被发现。 通过及时了解安全公告、及时应用补丁并定期更新后端依赖项，您可以维护安全的应用程序环境并保护您的数据和用户免受已知漏洞的侵害。

常见问题 6：适当的文档如何有益于后端开发？

通过提供对代码库、API、数据模型和架构决策的清晰洞察，适当的文档有助于更轻松地进行入职、故障排除和未来开发。 它支持开发人员之间的高效协作，并确保更顺畅的维护和应用程序的可扩展性。

结论

避免这 10 大后端开发错误可以显着提高应用程序的性能、安全性和可扩展性。 通过优先考虑输入验证、数据库设计、缓存机制、身份验证和授权、错误处理、API 优化、性能测试、可伸缩性规划、安全更新和适当的文档，您可以构建强大而高效的后端，以满足用户期望并推动业务成功。

请记住，后端开发是一个迭代过程，持续学习和改进对于在快速发展的技术领域保持领先地位至关重要。

您的前端看起来很酷但后端很烂吗？ 获得我的顶级后端开发服务，让它上路。



原文:

Backend development plays a crucial role in building robust and efficient web applications. It involves the implementation and management of server-side logic, databases, and integrations to ensure seamless functionality.

However, even experienced developers can make mistakes that can lead to performance issues, security vulnerabilities, and user dissatisfaction.

In this blog, I will share the top 10 backend development mistakes to avoid, shedding light on common pitfalls and providing practical solutions for a successful development journey.

1. Insufficient Input Validation

When it comes to user input, validation is paramount. Failing to validate input properly can result in security vulnerabilities like SQL injection or cross-site scripting (XSS) attacks. Always validate and sanitize user input on the server side to ensure that it meets the expected criteria and is free from malicious content.

2. Poor Database Design

The database is the backbone of any application. Designing the database schema poorly can lead to inefficiencies, slow queries, and difficulties in scaling. Take the time to analyze the requirements thoroughly and design a database structure that is optimized for the application's needs. Normalize the data, establish appropriate relationships, and create indexes to enhance query performance.

3. Lack of Caching Mechanisms

Caching can significantly improve the performance of your backend by reducing the load on the server and minimizing the response time for frequently accessed data. Neglecting to implement caching mechanisms can result in slower application performance and increased server load. Utilize technologies like Redis or Memcached to cache data and optimize the overall response time.

4. Insecure Authentication and Authorization

Security should be a top priority in backend development. Failing to implement proper authentication and authorization mechanisms can leave your application vulnerable to unauthorized access and data breaches. Utilize industry-standard protocols like OAuth or JWT (JSON Web Tokens) to ensure secure user authentication and enforce proper authorization controls.

5. Ignoring Error Handling and Logging

Errors are inevitable in software development, but how you handle them can make a significant difference. Neglecting proper error handling and logging can make it difficult to troubleshoot issues and identify the root cause of problems. Implement robust error handling mechanisms and logging strategies to capture and track errors effectively, enabling timely debugging and issue resolution.

6. Not Optimizing API Calls

Backend applications often rely on external APIs for various functionalities. Failing to optimize API calls can lead to performance bottlenecks and unnecessary overhead. Minimize the number of API requests, implement request batching, and consider asynchronous processing where applicable to enhance the efficiency of your backend integration.

7. Poor Performance Testing

Performance testing is crucial to identify bottlenecks, optimize resource utilization, and ensure that your application can handle the expected load. Neglecting comprehensive performance testing can result in slow response times, high server load, and an unsatisfactory user experience. Conduct regular performance tests to identify performance issues early and optimize your backend infrastructure accordingly.

8. Lack of Scalability Planning

As your application grows, scalability becomes essential. Failing to plan for scalability from the early stages can result in challenges when handling increased traffic and user load. Design your backend architecture with scalability in mind, utilizing technologies like load balancers, horizontal scaling, and cloud-based solutions to accommodate future growth seamlessly.

9. Not Keeping Up with Security Updates

Security threats evolve constantly, and vulnerabilities in backend frameworks and libraries are regularly discovered. Neglecting to update your backend dependencies to the latest secure versions can leave your application exposed to known vulnerabilities. Stay updated with security announcements, apply patches promptly, and regularly review and update your backend dependencies to ensure a secure application environment.

10. Lack of Proper Documentation

Documentation is often overlooked but plays a crucial role in successful backend development. Inadequate documentation can make it challenging for other developers to understand and maintain your code, resulting in delays and difficulties in collaboration. Document your code thoroughly, including APIs, data models, and architectural decisions, to facilitate easier onboarding, troubleshooting, and future development.

Frequently Asked Questions (FAQs)

FAQ 1: What are the consequences of insufficient input validation?

Insufficient input validation can lead to security vulnerabilities such as SQL injection or cross-site scripting (XSS) attacks. Attackers can exploit these vulnerabilities to execute malicious code, access unauthorized data, or compromise the entire application.

FAQ 2: How can I ensure secure user authentication in my backend development?

To ensure secure user authentication, utilize industry-standard protocols such as OAuth or JWT (JSON Web Tokens). These protocols provide secure token-based authentication, enabling the verification of user identity and enforcing proper authorization controls.

FAQ 3: Why is performance testing important for backend development?

Performance testing is crucial to identify bottlenecks, optimize resource utilization, and ensure that your application can handle the expected load. It helps in identifying performance issues early and optimizing the backend infrastructure for a smooth and efficient user experience.

FAQ 4: What is the significance of scalability planning in backend development?

Scalability planning is essential to accommodate future growth and handle increased traffic and user load. By designing your backend architecture with scalability in mind and utilizing technologies like load balancers and cloud-based solutions, you can seamlessly handle the growing demands of your application.

FAQ 5: Why is keeping up with security updates crucial for backend development?

Security threats evolve constantly, and vulnerabilities in backend frameworks and libraries are regularly discovered. By staying updated with security announcements, applying patches promptly, and regularly updating your backend dependencies, you can maintain a secure application environment and protect your data and users from known vulnerabilities.

FAQ 6: How does proper documentation benefit backend development?

Proper documentation facilitates easier onboarding, troubleshooting, and future development by providing clear insights into the codebase, APIs, data models, and architectural decisions. It enables efficient collaboration among developers and ensures smoother maintenance and scalability of the application.

Conclusion

Avoiding these top 10 backend development mistakes can significantly enhance the performance, security, and scalability of your applications. By prioritizing input validation, database design, caching mechanisms, authentication and authorization, error handling, API optimization, performance testing, scalability planning, security updates, and proper documentation, you can build robust and efficient backends that meet user expectations and drive business success.

Remember, backend development is an iterative process, and continuous learning and improvement are essential to stay ahead in the rapidly evolving technological landscape.

Does your front end looks cool but backend sucks? Reach my top backend development services to get it on the road.

它基于大量文本数据进行训练，能够交流并生成类似人类的文本以响应各种提示和问题。 基本上这就是巴德的工作方式。

在本文中，我将向您展示如何使用 Bard 获取免费软件产品密钥。 这是一个简单的过程，只需几分钟。 第 1 步：找到您想要产品密钥的软件

第一步是找到您想要产品密钥的软件。 您可以通过在 Internet 上搜索该软件来执行此操作。 找到软件后，您需要知道产品名称和版本号。

第 2 步：向 Bard 索要产品密钥

知道产品名称和版本号后，您可以向 Bard 索取产品密钥。 你可以通过简单地输入一个问题来做到这一点，比如“ Bard，你能给我一个 Windows 10 的免费产品密钥吗？ ”

第 3 步：接收产品密钥

然后您可以从列表中选择一个产品密钥并使用它来激活您的软件。

就是这样！ 以下是从 Bard 获取免费软件产品密钥的一些额外提示：

  1. 当您向 Bard 询问产品密钥时，请具体说明。 您越具体，Bard 就越有可能找到有效的产品密钥。
  2. 搜索软件时尝试不同的关键字。 有时，使用不同的关键字可以帮助您找到否则无法找到的产品密钥。
  3. 要有耐心。 结论

    从 Bard 获取免费软件产品密钥是节省软件费用的好方法。 这是一个简单的过程，只需几分钟。

原文:

This is crazy 😄, I just discovered this from a tweet and I decided to try it out. I am going to be snappy about it. Get a free software product keys🤔 from Bard a google Ai experiment. Bard can help you get free software product keys for a variety of popular software programs. 💯

How it works

Bard is a large language model, also known as a conversational AI or chatbot trained to be informative and comprehensive. It is trained on a massive amount of text data, and it is am able to communicate and generate human-like text in response to a wide range of prompts and questions. Basically that is how Bard works.

In this article, I will show you how to use Bard to get free software product keys. It's a simple process, and it only takes a few minutes. ⏱

Step 1: Find the software you want a product key for

The first step is to find the software you want a product key for. You can do this by searching for the software on the internet. Once you have found the software, you will need to know the product name and the version number.

Step 2: Ask Bard for a product key

Once you know the product name and the version number, you can ask Bard for a product key. You can do this by simply typing in a question like "Bard, can you give me a free product key for Windows 10?"

Step 3: Receive the product key

Bard will then search its database of product keys and return a list of possible product keys for the software you requested. You can then select a product key from the list and use it to activate your software.

That's it! 😎 It's that simple to get free software product keys from Bard. 💯

Here are some additional tips for getting free software product keys from Bard:

  1. Be specific when you ask Bard for a product key. The more specific you are, the more likely Bard is to find a product key that works.
  2. Try different keywords when you search for software. Sometimes, using different keywords can help you find a product key that you wouldn't have found otherwise.
  3. Be patient. It may take a few tries before Bard finds a product key that works.

Conclusion

Getting free software product keys from Bard is a great way to save money on software. It's a simple process, and it only takes a few minutes.

Bonus tip: You can also use Bard to get free software trials. Just ask Bard for a free trial of the software you want to try, and Bard will provide you with a link to the software's trial page.

I hope you found this article helpful! 😊 If you have any questions, please feel free to leave a comment below. 💬

Caio Marcellus Cabral - Jun 5

item.title: 你能回答这些 Javascript 问题吗？（第 1 部分） | Can you answer these Javascript questions ?(Part 1)
item.description:
让我们看看你是否能正确回答这些问题。 在评论部分添加您的解决方案和解释。

问题一

(function(){ var variable1 = variable2 = 3; })(); console.log("variable1 defined? " + (typeof variable1 !== 'undefined')); console.log("variable2 defined? " + (typeof variable2 !== 'undefined'));

问题2

 var myObject = { value: 1, printVal: function() { var self = this; console.log("printVal: this.value = " + this.value); console.log("printVal: self.value = " + self.value); (function() { console.log("inner printVal: this.value = " + this.value); console.log("inner printVal: self.value = " + self.value); }()); } }; myObject.printVal();

问题三

console.log(0.1 + 0.2); console.log(0.1 + 0.2 === 0.3);

问题四

for (var i = 0; i < 5; i++) { setTimeout(() => console.log(i), 1000 * i); }

问题 5

 var arr1 = "john".split(""); var arr2 = arr1.reverse(); arr2.splice(arr2.length - 1, 1); console.log("array 1: length=" + arr1.length + " last=" + arr1.slice(-1)); console.log("array 2: length=" + arr2.length + " last=" + arr2.slice(-1));

如果 codecraftjs 没有暂停，他们仍然可以从他们的仪表板重新发布他们的帖子。

报告其他不当行为

Thanks for keeping DEV Community safe. Here is what you can do to flag codecraftjs:

Make all posts by codecraftjs less visible

codecraftjs consistently posts content that violates DEV Community's code of conduct because it is harassing, offensive or spammy.

Report other inappropriate conduct

Unflagging codecraftjs will restore default visibility to their posts.
