item.title: 排名前 8 位的 Google 排名因素：对 SEO 真正重要的是什么 | Top 8 Google Ranking Factors: What REALLY Matters For SEO
item.description:
随着搜索引擎优化 (SEO) 的不断发展，了解影响 Google 搜索结果的关键排名因素对于在线成功至关重要。 谷歌利用复杂的算法来确定网站的相关性和质量，最终确定它们的排名。 在本文中，我们将探讨对 SEO 真正重要的8 个谷歌排名因素。 通过关注这些因素，您可以优化网站以提高其知名度、有机流量和整体搜索引擎排名。

内容质量和相关性

高质量和相关的内容对于在 Google 上获得最高排名至关重要。 确保您的内容写得很好、全面，并为用户提供价值。 自然地合并相关关键字，在优化和可读性之间保持平衡。 旨在创建权威内容来回答用户查询并满足他们的需求，将您的网站建立为您所在行业的可信资源。

反向链接和链接建设

反向链接或来自其他网站的入站链接仍然是重要的排名因素。 专注于从信誉良好的相关来源获取高质量的反向链接。 参与道德链接建设策略，例如客座博客、外展活动和创建自然吸引反向链接的有价值的内容。

移动友好性和响应式设计

鉴于移动浏览的日益普及，拥有适合移动设备的网站对于SEO至关重要。 确保您的网站针对移动设备进行了优化，从而在各种屏幕尺寸上提供无缝的用户体验。 实施响应式设计技术，自动调整您网站的布局和内容以适应不同的设备。 谷歌的移动优先索引在搜索排名中优先考虑适合移动设备的网站，使移动优化成为需要考虑的重要因素。

页面速度和加载时间

页面速度在用户体验和 SEO 中起着至关重要的作用。 通过压缩图像、缩小代码和利用浏览器缓存来优化网站的加载时间。 页面加载缓慢会导致更高的跳出率和降低用户满意度。 定期监控和提高您网站的速度，以提高用户参与度并增加在搜索结果中排名更高的机会。

用户体验和参与

谷歌重视用户体验信号来确定网站的质量。 低跳出率、较长的平均会话持续时间和高点击率等因素有助于提供积极的用户体验。 优化网站的导航、设计和可用性，以增强用户参与度。 提供有价值且引人入胜的内容，鼓励用户留在您的网站上并进一步探索。

页面优化

页面优化涉及优化网站内的各种元素，以提高其对搜索引擎的可见性。 这包括优化标题标签、元描述、标题和 URL 结构。 在您的内容中自然地融入相关关键字并优化图像 alt 标签。 专注于提供清晰简洁的用户体验，确保您的网站易于被搜索引擎机器人抓取。

域名权限和可信度

域权限是指示网站的可信度和权限的指标。 通过获取高质量的反向链接、创建有价值的内容和建立强大的在线形象来提高您​​的域权限。 通过权威内容、推荐和积极的用户评论展示您所在行业的专业知识和信誉。 旨在建立用户信任的知名品牌，因为这会对您的搜索引擎排名产生积极影响。

社会信号

虽然社交信号对搜索排名的直接影响存在争议，但社交媒体的存在可以间接影响 SEO。 在社交平台上与您的受众互动，鼓励社交分享您的内容，并建立强大的社交媒体追随者。 喜欢、分享和评论等社交信号可以提高您的内容的可见度，并为您的网站带来有机流量。 此外，社交媒体资料通常在搜索结果中排名靠前，让用户能够发现您的品牌并与之互动。

结论

了解最重要的 Google 排名因素对于制定有效的 SEO 策略至关重要。 通过关注内容质量、反向链接、移动友好性、页面速度、用户体验、页面优化、域权限和社交信号，您可以提高网站的知名度和有机排名。 请记住，搜索引擎优化是一个持续的过程，保持算法变化和行业趋势的更新对于持续成功至关重要。 投入时间和精力根据这些因素优化您的网站，您将顺利实现更高的搜索引擎排名并为您的网站带来更多自然流量。



原文:

As search engine optimization (SEO) continues to evolve, understanding the key ranking factors that influence Google's search results is essential for online success. Google utilizes a complex algorithm to determine the relevance and quality of websites, ultimately determining their rankings. In this article, we will explore the top 8 Google ranking factors that truly matter for SEO. By focusing on these factors, you can optimize your website to improve its visibility, organic traffic, and overall search engine rankings.

Content Quality and Relevance

High-quality and relevant content is crucial for achieving a top ranking on Google. Ensure your content is well-written, comprehensive, and provides value to users. Incorporate relevant keywords naturally, maintaining a balance between optimization and readability. Aim to create authoritative content that answers user queries and addresses their needs, establishing your website as a trusted resource within your industry.

Backlinks and Link Building

Backlinks, or inbound links from other websites, remain a significant ranking factor. Google considers backlinks as votes of confidence and authority for your website. Focus on acquiring high-quality backlinks from reputable and relevant sources. Engage in ethical link-building strategies such as guest blogging, outreach campaigns, and creating valuable content that naturally attracts backlinks.

Mobile-Friendliness and Responsive Design

Given the increasing prevalence of mobile browsing, having a mobile-friendly website is critical for SEO. Ensure your website is optimized for mobile devices, providing a seamless user experience across various screen sizes. Implement responsive design techniques to automatically adapt your site's layout and content to different devices. Google's mobile-first index prioritizes mobile-friendly websites in search rankings, making mobile optimization an essential factor to consider.

Page Speed and Loading Time

Page speed plays a crucial role in user experience and SEO. Optimize your website's loading time by compressing images, minifying code, and leveraging browser caching. Slow-loading pages can result in higher bounce rates and decreased user satisfaction. Regularly monitor and improve your website's speed to enhance user engagement and increase the chances of ranking higher in search results.

User Experience and Engagement

Google places emphasis on user experience signals to determine the quality of a website. Factors such as low bounce rates, longer average session durations, and high click-through rates contribute to a positive user experience. Optimize your website's navigation, design, and usability to enhance user engagement. Provide valuable and engaging content that encourages users to stay on your site and explore further.

On-Page Optimization

On-page optimization involves optimizing various elements within your website to improve its visibility to search engines. This includes optimizing title tags, meta descriptions, headings, and URL structure. Incorporate relevant keywords naturally throughout your content and optimize image alt tags. Focus on providing a clear and concise user experience, ensuring your website is easily crawlable by search engine bots.

Domain Authority and Trustworthiness

Domain authority is a metric that indicates the trustworthiness and authority of a website. Improve your domain authority by acquiring high-quality backlinks, creating valuable content, and establishing a strong online presence. Demonstrate expertise and credibility in your industry through authoritative content, testimonials, and positive user reviews. Aim to build a reputable brand that users trust, as this can positively impact your search engine rankings.

Social Signals

While the direct impact of social signals on search rankings is debated, social media presence can indirectly influence SEO. Engage with your audience on social platforms, encourage social sharing of your content, and build a strong social media following. Social signals such as likes, shares, and comments can increase your content's visibility and drive organic traffic to your website. Additionally, social media profiles often rank well in search results, allowing users to discover and engage with your brand.

Conclusion

Understanding the top Google ranking factors is essential for developing an effective SEO strategy. By focusing on content quality, backlinks, mobile-friendliness, page speed, user experience, on-page optimization, domain authority, and social signals, you can enhance your website's visibility and organic rankings. Keep in mind that SEO is an ongoing process, and staying updated with algorithm changes and industry trends is crucial for continued success. Invest time and effort into optimizing your website based on these factors, and you'll be well on your way to achieving higher search engine rankings and driving more organic traffic to your site.
item.author: branddiariesagency

item.title: 什么是JavaScript？ How is JS Code executed line by line? JS代码是如何逐行执行的？ | What is JavaScript ? How is JS Code executed line by line?
item.description:
发表于 6 月 17 日

根据 MDN 文档，JavaScript 的高级定义是：

所有 JavaScript 代码都在其中执行。

执行上下文是一个包含两个组件的大盒子：

  1. 内存组件/变量环境
  2. 代码组件/执行线程

内存组件：这里所有的变量和函数都存储为键值对。

代码组件：这里整个 JS 代码一次一行执行。

上面的解释让我们得出了这个定义：
让我们通过理解这些关键字来分解上面的定义：同步：以特定顺序单线程：JavaScript 可以一次执行一个命令。

只有当当前行执行完毕后，它才能转到下一行。

现在让我们了解如何在 JavaScript 程序的帮助下创建执行上下文。

 var n = 2 function square(num){ var ans = num * num return ans } var square2 = square(n) var square4 = square(4)

当我们运行整个代码时，会创建一个全局执行上下文 (GEC)。 内存创建阶段

  • 代码执行阶段

    • 内存创建阶段在此阶段，JavaScript 将为所有变量和函数分配内存。

    内存分配从上面代码的第 1 行开始，一直到第 7 行。

    1. 当 JS 遇到第 1 行时，它将内存分配给 n。 它将特殊值存储为未定义。
    2. 然后它看到一个名为 square 的函数并将内存分配给变量 square。 这里它将函数的整个代码存储在这个内存空间中。
    3. 类似地，它将内存分配给未定义的 square2 和 square4。
    内存组件代码组件
    名词： undefined
    代码执行阶段
    内存分配阶段完成后，代码再次从第 1 行运行到第 7 行。

    1. 现在从第 2 行到第 5 行没有什么可执行的，所以它移动到第 6 行

    2. 在第 6 行调用函数，因为函数本身是一个新的小程序，所以创建了一个新的执行上下文。
      新的执行上下文再次具有内存组件和代码组件。

      1. 内存分配阶段

        1. 它将内存分配给 num: undefined
        2. 它将内存分配给 ans: undefined
        3. 没有更多的函数或变量，因此内存分配阶段已完成。
        内存组件代码组件
        数量： undefined
        答： undefined

      2. 代码执行阶段

        1. 当使用参数 n 调用函数时，第 1 行中的 n=2 作为参数传递给函数
        2. 在下一行中，num * num 在代码组件内部计算并放入内存组件中的 ans 中。
        3. 现在它看到返回 ans。 当 JS 遇到 return 时，它将控制返回到调用函数的执行上下文。
        4. 现在控件再次转到第 6 行。
        5. 现在将删除此 square 函数实例的整个执行上下文。

    3. 现在 square2 变量的未定义将被替换为 4（返回为 ans）

    4. 将在第 7 行调用 Similary 函数并将 4 作为参数传递，这将返回 16（以上所有步骤以相同顺序重复）。

    现在 JS 完成了整个代码的执行，现在整个全局执行上下文被删除了。
    这就是 JavaScript 代码逐行执行的方式。

    谢谢！

    一旦暂停，harshitagupta 将无法发表评论或发布帖子，直到他们的暂停被取消。

    一旦解除暂停，harshitagupta 将能够再次发表评论和发布帖子。

    一旦取消发布，harshitagupta 的所有帖子都将隐藏起来，只有他们自己可以访问。

    如果 harshitagupta 没有被暂停，他们仍然可以从他们的仪表板重新发布他们的帖子。

    笔记：

    感谢您维护 DEV 社区的安全。 您可以通过以下方式标记 harshitagupta：

    降低 harshitagupta 的所有帖子的可见度

    报告其他不当行为

    不屈不挠的 harshitagupta 将恢复他们帖子的默认可见性。



    原文:

    Harshita Gupta

    Posted on Jun 17

    According to MDN Docs, a high level definition of JavaScript is:

    JavaScript is a scripting or programming language that allows you to implement complex features on web pages.

    Everything in JavaScript happens inside Execution Context. All the JavaScript code is executed inside it.

    The execution context is a big box that contains two components:

    1. Memory Component/Variable Environment
    2. Code Component/Thread of Execution

    Memory Component: Here all the variables and functions are stored as key-value pairs.

    Code Component: Here whole JS code is executed one line at a time.

    The above explanation makes us reach to this definition:
    JavaScript is a Synchronous Single-Threaded language

    Let's break down the above definition by understanding these keywords: Synchronous: In a specific order Single-threaded: JavaScript can execute one command at a time.

    It can only go to the next line once the current line has been finished executing.

    Now let us understand how the execution context is created with the help of JavaScript program.

    var n = 2
function square(num){ var ans = num * num return ans
}
var square2 = square(n)
var square4 = square(4)

    When we run this whole code, a global execution context(GEC) is created. GEC is created in two phases:

    1. Memory Creation Phase
    2. Code Execution Phase

    Memory Creation Phase In this phase JavaScript will allocate memory to all the variables and functions.

    Memory allocation starts from line 1 and goes till line 7 of the above code.

    1. As JS encounters line 1 it allocates memory to n. It stores a special value as undefined.
    2. It then see a function named square and allocation memory to variable square. Here it stores the whole code of the function inside this memory space.
    3. Similary it will allocate memory to square2 and square4 as undefined.
    Memory Component Code Component
    n: undefined
    square: (num){ var ans = num * num return ans

    }
    square2: undefined
    square4: undefined

    Code Execution Phase
    The code again runs from line 1 to 7 after the memory allocation phase is finished.

    1. JS encounters line 1 and replaces n's value from undefined to 2
    2. Now from line 2 to 5 there is nothing to execute so it moves to line 6

    3. At line number 6 function is invoked, since function is a new mini program in itself so a new Execution Context is created.
      New execution context again has memory component and code component.

      1. Memory Allocation Phase

        1. It allocates memory to num: undefined
        2. It allocates memory to ans: undefined
        3. No more functions or variables so memory allocation phase is completed.
        Memory Component Code Component
        num: undefined
        ans: undefined

      2. Code Execution Phase

        1. When function is invoked with argument n then in line 1 n=2 which is passed as parameter to the function
        2. In the next line num * num is calculated inside code component and put inside ans in memory component.
        3. Now it sees return ans. When JS encounters return it returns the control back to the execution context where the function was invoked.
        4. Now the control goes line 6 again.
        5. The whole execution context for this instance of square function will now be deleted.

    4. Now the square2 variable's undefined will be replaced with 4 (retuned as ans)

    5. Similary function will be invoked on line 7 and pass 4 as argument which will return 16 (with all the above steps repeating in the same order).

    Now JS is done with executing the whole code, now the whole Global execution context is deleted.
    This is how JavaScript code is executed line by line.

    Thanks!

    shrey vijayvargiya - Jun 10

    John Mark Bulabos - Jun 3

    Cristian Magalhães - May 24

    Once suspended, harshitagupta will not be able to comment or publish posts until their suspension is removed.

    Once unsuspended, harshitagupta will be able to comment and publish posts again.

    Once unpublished, all posts by harshitagupta will become hidden and only accessible to themselves.

    If harshitagupta is not suspended, they can still re-publish their posts from their dashboard.

    Note:

    Thanks for keeping DEV Community safe. Here is what you can do to flag harshitagupta:

    Make all posts by harshitagupta less visible

    harshitagupta consistently posts content that violates DEV Community's code of conduct because it is harassing, offensive or spammy.

    Report other inappropriate conduct

    Unflagging harshitagupta will restore default visibility to their posts.

item.title: 亚马逊如何利用电子邮件通讯的力量 | How Amazon Utilizes the Power of Email Newsletters
item.description:
随着电子商务的发展，亚马逊已成为世界上最大的在线市场之一。 作为行业巨头，亚马逊与客户保持联系并让他们了解最新的交易、促销和产品非常重要。 亚马逊这样做的方法之一是使用电子邮件营销和时事通讯。 这篇博文将探讨亚马逊如何使用电子邮件通讯来提高客户参与度并增加销售额。

电子邮件通讯对亚马逊的重要性

建立持久的客户关系

电子邮件通讯的主要好处之一是能够建立和维持持久的客户关系。 通过向订阅者发送定期更新，亚马逊让订阅者了解新产品、即将到来的销售和令人兴奋的促销活动。 这有助于保持客户的兴趣并鼓励重复购买。

针对特定的客户群

亚马逊利用Mailscribe等电子邮件营销工具，根据他们的兴趣和购买历史来定位特定的客户群。 这种个性化水平使亚马逊能够向订阅者发送相关且引人入胜的内容，从而提高打开率和点击率。

提高品牌忠诚度

通过电子邮件通讯进行定期沟通有助于提高亚马逊客户的品牌忠诚度。 通过提供有价值的内容，订阅者更有可能与品牌保持互动并继续购买。

创建像亚马逊这样有效的电子邮件时事通讯的提示和技巧

利用人工智能驱动的电子邮件营销平台

要创建有效的电子邮件通讯，请考虑使用AI 驱动的电子邮件营销平台，例如 Mailscribe。 这些平台提供预编码组件、易于使用的电子邮件设计器和 AI 驱动的内容生成器，无需任何编码或设计技能即可帮助创建专业且引人入胜的时事通讯。

个性化您的内容

正如亚马逊所展示的那样，个性化您的电子邮件内容对于您的电子邮件活动的成功至关重要。 按兴趣、购买历史和其他相关因素对订阅者进行细分，以发送有针对性的相关内容。

保持一致的时间表

在电子邮件通讯方面，一致性是关键。 确定正确的频率并坚持一致的时间表，以保持订阅者的参与度并期待您的电子邮件。

实施清晰的号召性用语 (CTA)

确保您的电子邮件通讯包含明确的号召性用语 (CTA)，鼓励订阅者采取行动，无论是购买、在您的网站上阅读更多内容，还是与朋友分享通讯。

跟踪和优化性能

使用您的电子邮件营销平台提供的分析来监控您的电子邮件通讯的性能。 这将有助于找出哪些内容最能引起订阅者的共鸣，并对您未来的营销活动进行数据驱动的改进。

结论

亚马逊在电子邮件通讯方面的成功可以为希望提高客户参与度和销售额的企业提供宝贵的经验教训。 通过利用 AI 驱动的电子邮件营销平台、个性化内容和实施其他最佳实践，企业可以创建有效的电子邮件通讯，以推动客户参与并产生利润。



原文:

With the growth of e-commerce, Amazon has become one of the world's largest online marketplaces. As an industry giant, it is important for Amazon to stay connected with its customers and keep them informed on the latest deals, promotions, and products. One of the ways Amazon does this is through the use of email marketing and newsletters. This blog post will explore how Amazon uses email newsletters to boost customer engagement and increase sales.

The Importance of Email Newsletters for Amazon

Building Long-lasting Customer Relationships

One of the key benefits of email newsletters is the ability to build and maintain long-lasting customer relationships. By sending regular updates to subscribers, Amazon keeps its subscribers informed about new products, upcoming sales, and exciting promotions. This helps to maintain customer interest and encourage repeat purchases.

Targeting Specific Customer Segments

Amazon takes advantage of email marketing tools like Mailscribe to target specific customer segments based on their interests and purchase history. This level of personalization allows Amazon to send relevant and engaging content to subscribers, resulting in higher open and click-through rates.

Increasing Brand Loyalty

Regular communication through email newsletters helps to increase brand loyalty among Amazon's customers. By providing valuable content, subscribers are more likely to remain engaged with the brand and continue to make purchases.

Tips and Tricks for Creating Effective Email Newsletters like Amazon

Utilize an AI-powered Email Marketing Platform

To create effective email newsletters, consider using an AI-powered email marketing platform like Mailscribe. These platforms offer pre-coded components, easy-to-use email designers, and AI-driven content generators that can help create professional and engaging newsletters without requiring any coding or design skills.

Personalize Your Content

As demonstrated by Amazon, personalizing your email content is crucial to the success of your email campaign. Segment your subscribers by interests, purchase history, and other relevant factors to send targeted and relevant content.

Maintain A Consistent Schedule

Consistency is key when it comes to email newsletters. Determine the right frequency and stick to a consistent schedule to keep your subscribers engaged and looking forward to your emails.

Implement Clear Calls-to-action (CTAs)

Ensure that your email newsletters contain clear calls-to-action (CTAs) that encourage subscribers to take action, whether that may be making a purchase, reading more on your website or even sharing the newsletter with friends.

Track and Optimize Performance

Monitor the performance of your email newsletters using analytics provided by your email marketing platform. This will help find out which content resonates best with subscribers and make data-driven improvements to your future campaigns.

Conclusion

Amazon's success with email newsletters can serve as a valuable lesson for businesses looking to boost customer engagement and sales. By leveraging AI-powered email marketing platforms, personalizing content, and implementing other best practices, businesses can create effective email newsletters that drive customer engagement and generate profits.
